evidence: "Wow Amazon, as a lifelong fan from the 70's when i first read the hobbit..."
"the dwarf army was totally cool wrecking the elf army..."
"kind of a dumb storyline, an insult to my slightly above average intelligence."
"the story writing is getting a bit silly, but still entertaining."
"It starts out with a bang, gets boring and dumb in the middle, then ends pretty well."
"had to skip some of the boring acting parts, but fun for a sat morning watch."
"great acting directing & writing. You killed it!!!"
"Great finale, writers, actors, directors, special effects killed it!!!"
"Ultron makes the show, the rest of the actors pale in comparison."
"the music was great, they definitely stole from star wars, indiana, & matrix soundtracks and mixed them together, very well done!"
"the final battle scene on the war chariot was fantastic..."
"I love all the actors & the aes sedai are perfect..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fantasy and action genres, appreciating high production quality and sensory experiences. However, they exhibit mixed feelings towards narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a nuanced taste in storytelling.
